  <entry>
    <id>http://arxiv.org/abs/hep-ex/0406020v1</id>
    <title>Sparticle Reconstruction at LHC</title>
    <updated>2004-06-07T11:08:22Z</updated>
    <link href="https://arxiv.org/abs/hep-ex/0406020v1" rel="alternate" type="text/html"/>
    <link href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/hep-ex/0406020v1" rel="related" type="application/pdf" title="pdf"/>
    <summary>  In this report a review of recent studies made to understand the capability to discover and measure properties of SUSY particles at LHC is discussed. The expected resolution on sparticle masses is discussed on the basis of studies performed by the ATLAS and CMS collaborations.</summary>
    <category term="hep-ex" scheme="http://arxiv.org/schemas/atom"/>
    <published>2004-06-07T11:08:22Z</published>
    <arxiv:comment>Presented at XXXIX Rencontres de Moriond - QCD and Hadronic Interactions, 28 March - 4 April 2004, La Thuile, Italy</arxiv:comment>
    <arxiv:primary_category term="hep-ex"/>
    <author>
      <name>Alessia Tricomi</name>
      <arxiv:affiliation>for the ATLAS and CMS Collaborations</arxiv:affiliation>
    </author>
  </entry>
</feed>
